user_goal: 在 B007 回测质量强化基础上扩展研究级数据基础：定义 Global ETF research universe、扩展本地研究样本/fixture、建立可选公开数据导入安全边界、补强数据质量检查与 research limitation 标记，同时保持默认 CI fixture/mock-first 和 no-live/no-secret/no-network/no-broker/no-AI safety guards。

generator_handoff: Generator completed B008 F001-F005. F001 added research-only Global ETF universe config, loader, data dictionary docs, and tests for asset-class coverage and no live/broker authorization semantics. F002 added committed synthetic research sample fixture with SPY/QQQ/VEA/GLD/AGG/SGOV covering drawdown, choppy/recovery regimes, non-monotonic equity curve, and multi-asset rotation. F003 added manual-disabled public import boundary stub and docs/tests proving off-CI, credential-free, gitignored output, non-PIT best-effort semantics and no default network path. F004 added data quality/research limitation checks plus JSON/Markdown report fields for calendar gaps, suspicious jumps, synthetic sample source, non-PIT/public-best-effort limitations, and not-live-trading-ready labels. F005 strengthened workflow and safety guard regressions, including deterministic reports and no-live/no-secret/no-network/no-broker/no-AI assertions. Full local checks pass: .venv/bin/python -m pytest (48 passed), .venv/bin/python -m ruff check ., .venv/bin/python -m compileall trade tests, and .venv/bin/python -m mypy --install-types --non-interactive trade. Evaluator should run F006 independent L1 verification and produce signoff.
